sourcesContent:
<template>
  <router-view/>
</template>
<script>

  export default {
    name: 'App',  
  }
</script>

<style>
#app {
  font-family: Avenir, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;
  -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
  -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
  text-align: center;
  color: #2c3e50;  
}

body{
  padding:0;
  margin:0;
}
  
.logo{
  width:300px
}

.register input, .login input{
  width: 300px;
  height: 40px;
  padding-left: 20px;
  display: block;
  margin-bottom: 30px;
  margin-right: auto;
  margin-left: auto;
  border: 1px solid black;
}

.register button, .login button {
  width: 320px;
  height: 40px;
  border: 1px solid grey;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.nav a {
  float: left;
  color: white;
  padding: 14px 16px;
  text-align: center;
  font-size: 17px;
  text-decoration: none;
  margin: 5px;
}

.nav a:hover {  
  background:#ddd;
  color:#333
}
</style>
